---
title: ""
author: "Giorgio Arcara"
date: ""
#format: revealjs
format:
  beamer:
    theme: metropolis
    keep-tex: false
incremental: false
header-includes:
  \setbeamerfont{title}{size=\large}
  \usepackage{hyperref}
  \setbeamertemplate{footline}[frame number]
---

<!-- the section below is shown only if rendering is beamer from latex. (and format:revealjs is commmented) -->

::: {.content-visible when-format="beamer"}
```{=latex}
% TITLE SLIDES
\title{{\fontsize{15pt}{16pt}\selectfont Applied Psychometrics}:\\ studying subclinical psychopathologies\\ \vspace{1.5em} \raggedright \emph{Introduction to the course}}
\author{Giorgio Arcara,\\ University of Padua \\ IRCCS San Camillo, Venezia}

\titlegraphic{

\vspace*{7cm}
\includegraphics[scale=0.15]{Figures/LogoSanCamilloIRCCS_Unipd_alpha.png}
\begin{center}
\vspace{-2.2em}
\includegraphics[scale=0.15]{Figures/CC_license_3_0.png}
\end{center}
}
\date{2026}
\maketitle
```
:::

## Psychometrics
```{=latex}
\pause
\centering
\includegraphics[width=0.7\textwidth]{Figures/Scared.png}
```

## Topics of the course
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\Large
\textbf{Tests and measurement in clinical practice}
\end{center}
```

## Goals of this course
I want to show you that: \pause

- Psychometrics is not an enemy \pause
- it can be integrated into clinical practice \pause
- There are better and worse ways to use tests

## Today's Lesson
- Introduction of the instructor and the course
- Organizational aspects of the course
- Educational method

## CV Giorgio Arcara

\includegraphics[scale=0.05]{Figures/Arcara-Giorgio.jpg}

- Since 2006 interest in tests (especially in Neuropsychology)
- Since 2016 Researcher at IRCCS San Camillo in Venice
- Since 2025 Associate Professor in Psychometrics - Unipd

## Contacts and references
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\Large
\href{https://giorgioarcara.github.io}{\underline{https://giorgioarcara.github.io}}\\
\vfill
\href{giorgio.arcara\@unipd.it}{\underline{giorgio.arcara@unipd.it}}
\pause
\vfill
\emph{Feel free to contact me when needed}
\end{center}

```

## Organizational aspects - Activities

```{=latex}
\textbf{Activities of this course}
\vfill
\begin{itemize}
\item Asyncronous Videolectures (~10 min) \footnotesize (posted every week) \pause
\normalsize
\item Other activities. \pause
\begin{itemize}
\item Short Quizzes (for self assessment) 
\item Group activities (e.g. Forum discussions) \pause
\end{itemize}
\end{itemize}
```

## Organizational aspects - Materials
\textbf{All materials on Moodle}
  
- slides \pause
- articles \pause
- other materials (e.g. links) \pause

## Organizational aspects - Evaluation

\textbf{To successfully complete the course}

- completing all activities on Moodle \pause
- writing a final short essay and submit it on moodle (1-2 pages) \pause
- no exam/no vote 

## Goals and teaching method
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
Method based on \textbf{Teaching4Learning} approach and focused on "Active Learning" and "Learning by doing"\\
\pause
\vfill
\emph{Please complete all activities!}
\end{center}
```

## Feedbacks!
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.4\textwidth]{Figures/feedbacks.png}
\end{center}

## 
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\Large
Let's navigate the Moodle page
\end{center}
```
